hero.headline: The Market's best kept recipe.
hero.subtitle: Smarter signals. Machine learning. Profitable results.

how_it_works.subtitle: From raw market data to precise trading signals — here's how we cook.

step_1.title: Scan
step_1.subtitle: 147+ indicators analyzed
step_1.description: Every 15 minutes, our algorithms scan candlesticks, volume, momentum, divergence, and 143 more indicators across multiple pairs. Nothing escapes the kitchen.

step_2.title: Analyze
step_2.subtitle: ML models decide
step_2.description: Trained on 5.2 million candles spanning 4+ years, our models separate noise from signal. They know when to cook — and when to stay out of the kitchen.

step_3.title: Execute
step_3.subtitle: 9 bots trade live
step_3.description: Nine autonomous strategies execute trades in real-time on the Lighter exchange. Each with its own recipe, its own edge, its own risk profile.

signals.subtitle: Real signals from our live bots. Updated in real-time.

pricing.subtitle: One subscription. Everything included.
pricing.crypto_note: Pay with USDC on Ethereum. Bitcoin also accepted.

trust.tagline: We don't tell you when to buy or sell. We show you what the market is doing, so you can decide.
trust.risk_disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Only trade with capital you can afford to lose.
